title: Bathroom & Kitchen fan-control PREVIEW bundle variants
description: Source-of-truth promotion of the Bathroom and Kitchen PoE room-bundle fan-control variants from planning-only (ROOM-BUNDLE-FAN-VARIANTS-001) to an explicit PREVIEW bundle plan (ROOM-BUNDLE-FAN-VARIANTS-002). The plan is that WebFlash easy mode becomes a bundle picker in which these fan-control variants MAY appear as Advanced-install-only, acknowledgement-gated PREVIEW bundle products (with warnings); the stable / full release of every fan-control variant stays gated behind hardware / bench-evidence / compliance gates. This file remains documentation / source-of-truth metadata only: it adds no product YAML, no firmware config string, no artifact_name, no config/webflash-builds.json row, flips no webflash_build_matrix, publishes no firmware, and does NOT touch the WebFlash repo. Per-variant fields record the real firmware-config status verified against config/preview-release-targets.json, config/preview-fan-triac-build-rows.json, config/manual-firmware-artifacts.json, config/product-catalog.json, and config/webflash-builds.json. Missing full-bundle firmware configs are marked preview-planned-missing-config and are NOT silently exposed; a fan-only config (e.g. Ceiling-POE-FanPWM / Ceiling-POE-FanDAC) is deliberately NOT substituted for a room-bundle variant because it omits the bundle's room-sensing modules. Relay / PWM / 0-10V (DAC) / TRIAC control are NOT interchangeable at runtime. Only Bathroom and Kitchen have fan variants; Corridor / Landing, Living Room, and Bedroom remain sensing / status bundles. Bathroom TRIAC is an ADVANCED / manual-warning preview only and is currently build-blocked (HW-005); Kitchen has NO TRIAC variant. See docs/sense360-room-bundles.md.

warning_copy.preview: PREVIEW FIRMWARE — buildable and installable for testers only. This build is NOT hardware verified, NOT stable, NOT recommended, and NOT a customer default. No bench evidence and no compliance is claimed. Flash at your own risk and expect to recover with the rescue/stable firmware.
warning_copy.advanced-preview: ADVANCED PREVIEW — MAINS-VOLTAGE RISK. This firmware drives mains-voltage hardware (e.g. TRIAC phase-control dimming) and is for competent persons performing a manual installation only. It is NOT hardware verified, NOT stable, NOT recommended, and is NEVER a default. No bench evidence and no electrical-safety / compliance certification is claimed. Incorrect installation can cause fire, electric shock, or death. Do not install unless you are qualified to work on mains wiring.
warning_copy.preview-planned-missing-config: PLANNED PREVIEW — NO FIRMWARE BUILT YET. The full room-bundle firmware config for this fan-control variant has not been built or published, so it is NOT installable, NOT released, NOT buyable, and NOT exposed in WebFlash. A fan-only firmware config (e.g. Ceiling-POE-FanPWM / Ceiling-POE-FanDAC) is deliberately NOT substituted because it omits the bundle's room-sensing modules. This variant becomes an Advanced-install-only preview only after its full-composition firmware config is built and imported; stable / full release additionally requires hardware, bench evidence, and compliance sign-off.

fan_variant_candidates.name: Bathroom Bundle, PoE + Relay Fan Control

composition_check.note: Ceiling-POE-VentIQ-FanRelay-RoomIQ carries the Bathroom room modules (VentIQ + RoomIQ) plus the FanRelay driver; it is a correct full-bundle composition, not a fan-only config.

stable_blockers: Mains-safety / installation-approval / creepage / clearance evidence + competent-person sign-off + GPIO3 strap-pin boot characterisation (S360-310).
Shared S360-410 PoE PSU schematic verification (PRODUCT-POE-410-001).
fan_variant_candidates.warning_copy: PREVIEW FIRMWARE — buildable and installable for testers only. This build is NOT hardware verified, NOT stable, NOT recommended, and NOT a customer default. No bench evidence and no compliance is claimed. Flash at your own risk and expect to recover with the rescue/stable firmware.
fan_variant_candidates.notes: Relay on/off extractor control (S360-310) on top of the stable Bathroom PoE bundle. This is the ONLY fan-control room-bundle variant whose full-composition firmware config is built and published today: it is a real PREVIEW target on the manual-preview lane (config/preview-release-targets.json target 'ceiling-poe-ventiq-fanrelay-roomiq-preview'; config/preview-fan-triac-build-rows.json). It is therefore WebFlash-easy-mode preview-eligible as an Advanced-install-only, acknowledgement-gated preview bundle. webflash_exposed stays false because no fan row is added to config/webflash-builds.json; the actual WebFlash one-click exposure is the separately queued downstream WebFlash-repo follow-up (WF-IMPORT-RELAY-001). Not stable, not recommended, not a default, not buyable.

fan_variant_candidates.name: Bathroom Bundle, PoE + TRIAC AC Fan Control (Advanced / manual)

firmware_config_evidence.build_blocker: HW-005 BUILDABILITY blocker: S360-320 schematic uncommitted; placeholder GPIO5/GPIO6 collide with RoomIQ J10 nets; ESPHome ac_dimmer cannot run across the SX1509 expander. No advanced-preview artifact can be cut until HW-005 resolves.

composition_check.note: The intended config Ceiling-POE-VentIQ-FanTRIAC-RoomIQ is a correct full-bundle composition (VentIQ + RoomIQ + FanTRIAC), but it is build-blocked (HW-005) so no installable artifact exists.

stable_blockers: HW-005 (S360-320 schematic uncommitted; GPIO5/GPIO6 collision with RoomIQ J10 nets; ac_dimmer cannot run across the SX1509 expander).
PACKAGE-TRIAC-001 + COMPLIANCE-001 mains-voltage electrical-safety review.
Shared S360-410 PoE PSU schematic verification (PRODUCT-POE-410-001).
fan_variant_candidates.warning_copy: ADVANCED PREVIEW — MAINS-VOLTAGE RISK. This firmware drives mains-voltage hardware (e.g. TRIAC phase-control dimming) and is for competent persons performing a manual installation only. It is NOT hardware verified, NOT stable, NOT recommended, and is NEVER a default. No bench evidence and no electrical-safety / compliance certification is claimed. Incorrect installation can cause fire, electric shock, or death. Do not install unless you are qualified to work on mains wiring.
fan_variant_candidates.notes: TRIAC AC (mains phase-cut) fan control (S360-320) for the Bathroom bundle. Offered ONLY as an ADVANCED / manual-warning preview — never a normal recommended / easy / default option. It is currently BUILD-BLOCKED by HW-005, so no preview artifact can be cut and it is NOT WebFlash-easy-mode eligible today; when HW-005 resolves it would be delivered ONLY on the advanced-manual-preview lane behind an explicit advanced (mains-risk) acknowledgement gate. Stable additionally requires PACKAGE-TRIAC-001 + COMPLIANCE-001. No safety / compliance proof is claimed. Kitchen has no TRIAC variant by policy.

PLANNING-MISSING-CONFIG: the full-composition firmware config Ceiling-POE-VentIQ-FanPWM-RoomIQ does not exist, so this variant is explicitly marked missing and is NOT exposed. fan_variant_candidates.name: Kitchen Bundle, PoE + PWM (low-voltage / custom) Extract Control
fan_variant_candidates.policy_note: Kitchen PWM is an OPTIONAL, policy-gated variant for low-voltage / custom kitchen extract use only (not a typical mains kitchen-extract control). It is recorded as a planning-missing-config record so the plan is explicit; it makes no firmware, exposure, commercial, or recommendation claim and can be dropped if policy does not approve low-voltage / custom kitchen extract use.
